zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Ida de Grey於1368年出生在威爾士丹比爾盧時，她的父親Reynold Grey46歲，母親Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn41歲。她於1387年與John Cokayne在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1426年6月1日在英國貝德福爾考卡 哈特利享年58歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾考卡 哈特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness Ida de Grey于1368年出生在威尔士丹比爾盧时，她的父亲Reynold Grey46岁，母亲Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn41岁。她于1387年与John Cokayne在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1426年6月1日在英国貝德福爾考卡 哈特利享年58岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾考卡 哈特利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Ida de Grey was born in 1368, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, her father, Reynold Grey, was 46 and her mother, Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, was 41. She married John Cokayne in 1387, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 1 June 1426, in Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales: Ruthin, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness Ida de Grey est née en 1368, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Reynold Grey, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé John Cokayne en 1387, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1426, à Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baroness Ida de Grey 1368 in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reynold Grey 46 und ihre Mutter Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn 41. Sie hat 1387 in Derbyshire, England John Cokayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1426 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Ida de Grey è nata il nel 1368 nel Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, sua padre, Reynold Grey, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato John Cokayne nel 1387, nel Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1426, nel Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Ida de Greyが1368年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで生まれた時，父Reynold Greyは46歳，母Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthynは41歳であった。1387年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでJohn Cokayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1426年6月1日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアコクアイン ハトリーで58歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアコクアイン ハトリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Ida de Grey(이)가 1368년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reynold Grey(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1387년 영국 더비실르에서 John Cokayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1426년 6월 1일 영국 베드퍼드실르 콕아이인 하틀리에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 콕아이인 하틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Ida de Grey nasceu em 1368, em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Reynold Grey, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com John Cokayne em 1387, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1426, em Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Ida de Grey родилась в 1368 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Reynold Grey было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cokayne в 1387 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 1 июня 1426 г. в местности коккеин хатли, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности коккеин хатли, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baroness Ida de Grey nació en 1368, en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Reynold Grey, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, tenía 41 años. Se casó con John Cokayne en 1387, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1426, en Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
